title: Fusion-status annotation (EWSR1-FLI1 / EWSR1-ERG / variant) with provenance
context: The defining feature of Ewing sarcoma models is the EWSR1 fusion. Each catalogued model needs its fusion annotated (EWSR1-FLI1 vs EWSR1-ERG vs variant/other, with breakpoint type and evidence), with cross-source disagreements surfaced rather than hidden. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Annotate fusion status (partner, breakpoint type, evidence) with field-level provenance for every catalogued model.
acceptanceCriteria: Each catalogued model has fusion annotated as partner5p (EWSR1) / partner3p (FLI1|ERG|other) / breakpointType with an evidence[] array, each provenanced.
Cross-source disagreements (e.g. FLI1 vs ERG, differing breakpoint type) are shown with all sources, not silently resolved.
Fusion calls cite a primary/authoritative source; no fusion is asserted without provenance.
No therapeutic/prognostic claim is attached; deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0; domain reviewer confirms framing.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: catalog/ fusion annotations (provenanced fusion fields) for every catalogued model (dataset).
